description_long: This is a tall, rectangular metal cabinet with a dark olive-green finish, featuring a utilitarian and industrial design. The front side has a vented grille at the top and a large, flat panel below, likely serving as a door or access panel. One side displays a textured, diamond-patterned ventilation area and two recessed panels, while the opposite side is dominated by a large, grid-like vent. The rear is open, revealing a series of internal shelves on the left and a set of vertical slots and a textured panel on the right, suggesting storage or organizational functions. The surfaces show signs of wear and minor rust, indicating outdoor or heavy-duty use. This cabinet is suitable for urban environments such as garages, maintenance rooms, or utility areas.
description: A tall, olive-green metal cabinet with vented panels, internal shelving, and an open back, showing signs of wear and industrial use.
description_view_0: The front view shows a vented grille at the top and a large, flat panel below, likely an access door.
description_view_1: This side view displays a diamond-patterned vent and two recessed rectangular panels, with a mostly flat surface.
description_view_2: The opposite side is dominated by a large, grid-like vent covering most of the surface.
description_view_3: The rear view is open, revealing internal shelving on the left and vertical slots with a textured panel on the right.
